title: Basic JavaScript REST API Integration
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript REST API Integration. Focus on implementing RESTful API design correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript REST API Integration
description: Create a function that uses RESTful API design and HTTP methods and status codes together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript REST API Integration Project
description: Build a small application that applies RESTful API design, HTTP methods and status codes, Fetch and Axios in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript REST API Integration
description: The following code has bugs related to RESTful API design. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript REST API Integration
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with RESTful API design and HTTP methods and status codes.
